## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff strategy sprint for Gitpod's rebranding to ONA and new product direction, focusing on AI agents and secure development environments.](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gitpod rebranding to ONA to reflect expanded vision beyond cloud development environments](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [New focus on secure sandbox for software agents, targeting large enterprises in regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Aiming to position as "precursor for AI in software development", with unique value in security and parallelism](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Challenges in messaging complex product to both individual developers and enterprise buyers](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

## Topics

### Gitpod Rebranding to ONA

  - [Driven by evolving product vision beyond cloud development environments](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Creates space for larger product ambitions and re-energizes stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Leverages Gitpod's security architecture to offer secure sandbox for software agents](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Targets large enterprises in regulated industries as ideal customer profile (ICP)](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### Product Differentiation

  - [Self-hosted in customer's VPC but vendor-managed for reduced operational overhead](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Provides isolated, secure environments for running AI agents at scale](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Integrates with existing tools and workflows, minimizing disruption](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Offers both centralized control and individual developer flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main CDE competitor is Coder, differentiated by Gitpod's managed service model](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [New competition from AI coding assistant companies (e.g. GitHub Copilot, Cursor)](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Positioning as foundational layer for securely running any AI coding tools](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

### Target Audience and Messaging

  - [Primary ICP: 1000+ employee companies in regulated industries with engineering productivity mandates](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Secondary: Individual developers as potential champions within enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Challenge: Appealing to both enterprise buyers and individual developers](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Considering shift from "CDE with agents" to "AI development platform for humans and agents"](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

### Go-to-Market Strategy

  - [Leveraging strategy sprint to reset approach given recent product changes](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Exploring content strategies to educate market on agent use cases and security considerations](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Investigating programmatic content generation for long-tail keywords related to development environments](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Considering affiliate site strategies to combat reduced organic traffic from AI-generated search results](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)

### Product Workflow

  - [Working to simplify self-serve onboarding with "Gitpod hosted compute" launch](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=2322.0)
  - [Ideal flow: One-click setup from GitHub, automated environment configuration by agent](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)
  - [Emphasizing parallelism and ability to run multiple agents simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Integrating with popular IDEs and tools while offering enhanced security and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow up with additional async questions to refine strategy](https://fathom.video/share/U3A6AX94f49psHJAtrBCE2uAbGzicXr7?tab=summary&timestamp=3990.0)
